extraction.one_line_summary: IMPEY Daryl won from a 15-rider breakaway after bridging an 'impossible' gap to catch RUIT Tiesj and ROCHE Nicolas on the final climb.
tactical_patterns: COSTA Rui's bridge attempt failed despite catching sight of breakaway, revealing exact limit between successful and failed chases on climbs.
BORA snuffed out BARDET Roman's local-rider attack using Team INEOS pace, showing GC teams sharing policing duties when threats emerge.
IMPEY bridged 'yawning gap' almost instantly after appearing cooked, suggesting tactical energy conservation before decisive final climb effort.
RUIT forced to lead final 2km despite inferior sprint, proving weaker sprinter loses two-up even when stronger on climbs.

rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: positive: First Tour stage win after previously only yellow jersey, showed ability to disguise fatigue then bridge decisively
rider_signals.COSTA Rui: negative: Solo bridge attempt failed within sight of breakaway, lacks either power or pacing judgment for long chases
rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: negative: Dropped from 15-rider breakaway before final climb despite presence, suggests declining climbing ability
rider_signals.MARTIN Tony: negative: Dropped from breakaway before finale despite 20km solo chase to join, wasted energy on bridge effort
rider_signals.BARDET Roman: neutral: Local attack on final climb immediately marked by INEOS, confirms he's still considered GC threat
